title: Xentara Client Certificate Configuration File
description: The root of the Xentara client certificate configuration file

rules.title: Matching Rules
rules.description: The matching rules used to assign roles to certificates

items.description: A single matching rule used to assign roles to certificates

issuer.title: Issuer DN
issuer.description: The full distinguished name of the issuer, in first-to-last order (C= or DC= first)

serialNumber.title: Certificate Serial Number
serialNumber.description: The serial number of the client certificate's public key, in hexadecimal format

SKI.title: Subject Key Identifier
SKI.description: The subject key identifier of the client certificate

subject.title: Subject DN
subject.description: The full distinguished name of the subject, in first-to-last order (C= or DC= first)

subjectPrefix.title: Subject DN Prefix
subjectPrefix.description: Leading components of the distinguished name of the subject, in first-to-last order (C= or DC= first)

publicKeySHA256.title: Public Key SHA-256 Hash
publicKeySHA256.description: The SHA-256 hash of the client certificate's public key

publicKeySHA1.title: Public Key SHA-1 Hash
publicKeySHA1.description: The SHA-1 hash of the client certificate's public key

NTDSObjectSID.title: Active Directory Object SID
NTDSObjectSID.description: The Microsoft Active Directory (NTDS) object SID stored in the certificate's ntdsCASecurityExt extension

fingerprint.title: Client certificate fingerprint
fingerprint.description: The SHA-256 or SHA-1 fingerprint of the client certificate

certificatePath.title: Client certificate path
certificatePath.description: The relative or absolute path to the client certificate

roles.title: Roles
roles.description: Additional roles (beyond "Everyone") to assign to clients whose certificate matches this rule

items.title: Role
items.description: A single role to assign to clients whose certificate matches this rule

rootCertificates.title: Issuer Root Certificates
rootCertificates.description: Custom root certificates for certificate issuers

items.title: Issuer Root Certificate
items.description: Custom root certificate for a single certificate issuer

issuer.title: Issuer DN
issuer.description: The full distinguished name of the issuer

certificatePath.title: Root certificate path
certificatePath.description: The relative or absolute path to the root certificate that this issuer uses
